task description and export_result.sh script path checking

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated dataset of 5 beneficiaries with overlapping and disjoint enrollment spans injected via setup_task.sh. The expected results exactly match the metadata claims: 10 continuous episodes, 5 gaps between episodes, 3 beneficiaries meeting the HEDIS criteria ('Y'), and 2 failing ('N'). The required CSV export path is /home/ga/Documents/exports/hedis_2023_report.csv.
